## Collections.ReadOnlyValidatingResultMap class

A read-only wrapper around an [IReadOnlyResultMap](./ts-utils.collections.ireadonlyresultmap.md) which exposes a validating interface.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class ReadOnlyValidatingResultMap<TK extends string = string, TV = unknown> extends ReadOnlyResultMap<TK, TV> implements IReadOnlyValidatingResultMap<TK, TV> 
```
